attacking_style: Shows early ambition by attacking first from breakaways, but lacks finishing power to convert. More effective as control rider than stage hunter.
team_tactics: Deployed as flat-stage control rider for Alpecin, tasked with break neutralization rather than personal results. Reliable domestique work over extended distances.
terrain_preference: Flat and rolling stages where tempo control matters. Exposed on extended climbs where coalition management and finishing power become critical.
vulnerability: Finishing power deficit in sprint situations and inability to sustain efforts on prolonged climbs. Coalition management issues when forced to negotiate with break companions.
key_patterns: Multiple break neutralization efforts across Vuelta, establishing flat-stage control specialist role
Attacks early from breaks showing ambition but cannot finish the effort
Work rate disputes in breakaways on climbs suggest struggles with extended climbing efforts
form_trajectory: neutral: Transitioned from break participation role in 2022 to more defined team control function in 2023, but no finishing improvement shown
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9
